message:
feat(ffs-dir): implement directory write operations (bd-zge.6)

Add/remove directory entries with ext4-style rec_len management,
init_dir_block for mkdir, and htree index helpers (insert/remove/find).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

  "ffs-ondisk",
